title: Funding rates normalizing — market positioning cautious but stable
text: Funding rates across major venues returning to neutral. Market positioning shows no strong directional bias. Liquidity conditions broadly stable with modest two-way flow.

title: Prediction markets showing modest activity — no strong regime signal
text: Prediction market volumes stable with modest outperforming patterns in select niches. No dominant macro theme. Mixed signals across sectors with balanced risk-reward.

title: Mixed macro data — indeterminate regime, balanced conditions
text: Economic data releases mixed. No dominant theme emerging. Market participants uncertain on direction. Conditions do not favour strong risk-on or risk-off positioning.
